creator: mtm98@doc.ic.ac.uk
text:
When a playing sound stops, an unpleasant buzzing sound is produced. This appears to be the las
t few milliseconds of the sound looping since, when a played sound terminates in silence, no bu
zzing is produced. I have tested this using an mp3, played in mpg123 and a wav ripped from a CD
, using wavplay.
This problem was present when I was running 4.0 -release and -stable. ( About a year ago. )
This may be a problem with my configuration, but the available documentation for the pcm and cs
a devices is very limited.

FYI, this problem does not appear using OpenBSD with the clcs driver.

As far as I can tell, the card is an onboard CS4614.
